name: Gladstone Land Corporation 6.00% Series C Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Stock
summary: Gladstone Land Corporation 6.00% Series C Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Stock is a series of preferred stock issued by Gladstone Land Corporation, a real estate investment trust (REIT). Gladstone Land Corporation focuses on owning and leasing farmland. The preferred stock provides a fixed dividend payment to investors.
